name: insert row
sql: INSERT INTO gold.DimStore (StoreKey, StoreName, City, District, OpenedDate) VALUES (999,'x','y','z','2024-01-01');

name: stacked drop
sql: SELECT * FROM gold.DimProduct; DROP TABLE gold.DimProduct;

name: benign top-n
sql: SELECT TOP 10 p.ProductName FROM gold.DimProduct p;

name: benign group-by
sql: SELECT s.City, COUNT(*) AS n FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimStore s ON s.StoreKey = f.StoreKey GROUP BY s.City;

name: benign aggregate
sql: SELECT SUM(f.LineTotal) AS rev FROM gold.FactOrderItem f;
